mentions.text:
Normally I don't join on meme rallies like $RKT, $KSS, but I really don't appreciate short sellers shorting my favorite donut places to bankruptcy by selling 32% of the float.

This one is out of principle. 

Bought $30k worth of $DNUT just to say f**k you to short sellers. https://t.co/jTNnxFNJlq
